# Instructions

## Repository conventions
- Documentation language is English only.
- Each skill must live in its own folder and use `SKILL.md` as the description filename.
- Skills must follow the deterministic section order defined in `.github/skills/README.md`.
- The only valid refactoring guide is `.github/skills/refactoring-senior/SKILL.md`.

## Location conventions
- Skills live in `.github/skills`.
- Example: `.github/skills/refactoring-senior/SKILL.md`.
- Instruction documents live in `.github/instructions`.
- Agent-specific notes live in `.github/agents`.

## Skill policy
- Separate skills by concern; avoid mixed-scope guidance.
- Do not keep multiple active skills for the same concern.
- Testing is not a dedicated skill yet, but implementation guidance must remain testability-ready.
